assertions.title: OpenAPI, docs, handoff docs, and tests match the surviving catalog surface

steps.action: Inspect mission guidance, validation contract, README, and catalog-consolidation hygiene docs
steps.expected: Named docs describe one surviving public catalog host and the canonical brand/product flow
steps.observed: docs/developer/catalog-consolidation/{README,01,02,03}.md and repo README all describe `/api/v1/catalog/**` only, with explicit `POST /api/v1/catalog/brands` then `POST /api/v1/catalog/products`.

steps.action: Inspect `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` and `erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv` for catalog route inventory
steps.expected: Handoff and route inventory expose only canonical catalog paths and omit retired accounting/production hosts
steps.observed: frontend handoff lists only `/api/v1/catalog/brands` and `/api/v1/catalog/products*`; endpoint inventory contains only `CatalogController` mappings for those catalog routes.

steps.action: Inspect route-anchored tests/helpers relevant to the packet
steps.expected: Tests assert canonical catalog operations and retirement of stale routes/inline fallback fields
steps.observed: `OpenApiSnapshotIT` asserts canonical catalog operations and missing retired routes; `AccountingCatalogControllerSecurityIT` asserts retired accounting/production paths are unmapped; `CatalogControllerCanonicalProductIT` rejects inline `brandName` fallback and treats `/api/v1/catalog/products/bulk` as retired.

steps.expected: Snapshot and route-anchored catalog tests pass against the checked-in contract
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; 9 tests run, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped.

steps.action: Inspect repo-root `openapi.json`, probe runtime OpenAPI, and run `git diff --check`
steps.expected: Snapshot contains canonical catalog routes only, runtime probe does not contradict the snapshot, and diff check is clean
steps.observed: `openapi.json` contains `/api/v1/catalog/brands` and `/api/v1/catalog/products` but not `/api/v1/accounting/catalog/**`, `/api/v1/production/brands*`, or `/api/v1/catalog/products/bulk`; runtime `GET /v3/api-docs` returned 403 in the compose-backed runtime; `git diff --check` produced no output.

keyFindings: Canonical OpenAPI routes present: GET/POST /api/v1/catalog/brands and GET/POST /api/v1/catalog/products.

Retired public routes absent from snapshot: /api/v1/accounting/catalog/import, /api/v1/accounting/catalog/products, /api/v1/accounting/catalog/products/{id}, /api/v1/accounting/catalog/products/bulk-variants, /api/v1/production/brands, /api/v1/production/brands/{brandId}/products, /api/v1/catalog/products/bulk.

Canonical request schema properties are basePrice, baseProductName, brandId, category, colors, gstRate, hsnCode, metadata, minDiscountPercent, minSellingPrice, sizes, unitOfMeasure; legacy fallback fields brandName/brandCode/brand are absent.
Named docs and packet tests are aligned to the surviving `/api/v1/catalog/**` surface.

issues: Runtime OpenAPI probe on the compose-backed app returned HTTP 403, so runtime comparison relied on passing `OpenApiSnapshotIT` and live route-alignment tests rather than direct `/v3/api-docs` inspection.

frictions.description: Compose-backed runtime blocks anonymous `/v3/api-docs` with HTTP 403, limiting direct runtime snapshot comparison.
frictions.resolution: Used `OpenApiSnapshotIT` plus route-anchored integration tests and file inspection as the primary contract-alignment proof; recorded the runtime probe result in evidence.

summary: VAL-CONTRACT-001 passed. The checked-in OpenAPI snapshot, named catalog docs, frontend handoff, endpoint inventory, and route-anchored tests all align on the surviving `/api/v1/catalog/**` contract; retired accounting/production catalog routes and inline brand fallback references are removed from the validated surfaces.
